zh.lifeSummary: 當Tomazin Carpenter於1600年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William Carpenter25歲，母親Alice Swithen20歲。她於1626年8月14日與Edward Webber在英國戴文易爾辛頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1645年在英國英格蘭戴文可雷迪頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tomazin Carpenter于1600年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William Carpenter25岁，母亲Alice Swithen20岁。她于1626年8月14日与Edward Webber在英国戴文易爾辛頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1645年在英国英格兰戴文可雷迪頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: Tomazin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (Tomažin): augmentative derivative of the personal name Tomaž (see Thomas , compare Tomas ).
altered form of Tomažin (see above), or a Slovenized form of Friulian Tomasin, a hypocoristic of the personal name Tomas (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Thomas
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Tomazin Carpenter was born in 1600, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Carpenter, was 25 and her mother, Alice Swithen, was 20. She married Edward Webber on 14 August 1626, in Ilsington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1645, in Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tomazin Carpenter è nata il nel 1600 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, William Carpenter, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alice Swithen, aveva 20 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Tomazin Carpenter(이)가 1600년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Carpenter(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Swithen(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1626년 8월 14일 영국 데폰 이징턴에서 Edward Webber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1645년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크레딧에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tomazin Carpenter nasceu em 1600, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Carpenter, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Swithen, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Webber em 14 de agosto de 1626, em Ilsington, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1645, em Crediton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tomazin Carpenter родилась в 1600 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Carpenter было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Swithen, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Webber 14 августа 1626 г. в местности илсингтон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1645 г. в местности кредитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tomazin Carpenter nació en 1600, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Carpenter, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Swithen, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Edward Webber el 14 de agosto de 1626, en Ilsington, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1645, en Crediton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
